summary: Phase 45 Checkout Promotion Integration - All tests passed. Backend: 14/14 tests passed covering product search enrichment, single product detail, public listing, guest checkout with promo pricing, promotion engine endpoints, and safety validation. Frontend: Marketplace shows promo badges (5.0% OFF), strikethrough pricing, PDP displays promo price with savings text. Admin Promotions page shows active 5% global promotion with toggle/delete controls.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd! (login via POST /api/admin/auth/login, portal at /admin)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing active 5% global promotion (id: promo_20260408100928_2968)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 45 Checkout Promotion Integration is complete and verified. Key points: 1) Active global 5% promotion 'Launch Special 5% Off' exists and is applied to all products with selling_price > 0. 2) /api/marketplace/products/search returns products with 'promotion' field enriched (promo_price, discount_label, discount_amount). 3) /api/marketplace/products/{id} returns single product with promotion enrichment. 4) /api/public-marketplace/listing/{slug} returns listing with promotion on main listing and related products. 5) /api/public/checkout resolves promo pricing per item - order items have promo_applied, promo_id, original_price, promo_discount_per_unit fields. 6) /api/promotion-engine/active returns active promotions. 7) /api/promotion-engine/preview-with-defaults validates safety - 5% is safe, 50% is blocked. 8) Frontend marketplace shows '5.0% OFF' badges on promo-eligible products with strikethrough original prices. 9) PDP shows promo badge, promo price (TZS 1,187,500), strikethrough original (TZS 1,250,000), and 'You save TZS 62,500 per unit' text. 10) Admin Promotions page at /admin/promotion-engine shows active promotion with toggle/delete controls. 11) Admin sidebar uses adminNavigation.js as single source of truth - one Settings section with Settings Hub and Users.

backend_product_search_enrichment.GET /api/marketplace/products/search: PASS - Returns products with promotion field
backend_product_search_enrichment.Products with price = 0 have promotion=n: PASS - No promo applied to zero-price products

backend_single_product_enrichment.GET /api/marketplace/products/{id}: PASS - Returns product with promotion field

backend_public_listing_enrichment.GET /api/public-marketplace/listing/{slu: PASS - Returns listing with promotion field
backend_public_listing_enrichment.Related products have promotion: PASS - Related items enriched with promotion data

backend_checkout_promo_resolution.POST /api/public/checkout: PASS - Creates order with promo pricing applied

frontend_marketplace_promo_display.Promo badges on product cards: PASS - Found 7 promo badges showing '5.0% OFF'

frontend_pdp_promo_display.PDP savings text: PASS - Shows 'You save TZS 62,500 per unit'

frontend_admin_promotions_page.Active promotion displayed: PASS - 'Launch Special 5% Off' with Active status
frontend_admin_promotions_page.Toggle/Delete controls: PASS - Found toggle, delete, edit buttons

frontend_admin_sidebar_navigation.Settings section: PASS - One Settings section with Settings Hub and Users
frontend_admin_sidebar_navigation.Growth & Affiliates section: PASS - Contains Affiliates, Affiliate Payouts, Margin & Distribution, Promotions
